text:

steps.text:
```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Scrape Hacker News] --> B[Extract top 5 stories]
    B --> C[Output table]
```

I will scrape Hacker News to retrieve the top 5 stories along with their point counts.

formats.prompt: Extract the titles and points for the top 5 stories on the page. Format as a list.

output.answer:
